_comment: Host-local launch recipes (copy to <roster-dir>/flotilla-launch.json or per-agent ~/.flotilla/<agent>/launch.json). Gitignored in production — this committed example shows the usage-limit downgrade SHAPE for #466. Agent keys MUST match flotilla.json. Launch commands are illustrative — pin your operator-ratified models in the real file.
_comment_failover: primary + fallbacks[] is the per-seat usage-limit policy. Account-side throttles prefer a same-provider fallback (model downgrade). Server-side throttles cross providers (harness switch). flotilla switch <agent> --to <slot> applies a slot; watch auto-switch is ON by default (disable with FLOTILLA_AUTOSWITCH=0) for execution desks AND coordinators (#510; approval_sensitive still refused). Auto-restore to primary when limits clear (disable with FLOTILLA_AUTOREVERT=0).

fallbacks._comment: In-provider model downgrade (Sonnet) — selected on account-side usage limits before crossing harnesses.
Cross-harness escape when Anthropic is server-side throttled.

xo-adj._comment: Adjutant launch must export FLOTILLA_SECRETS + FLOTILLA_ROSTER so notify/mirror-self resolve the adjutant webhook (#628). Host paths are illustrative.
